text: Thank you for calling Tech Gadget Malaysia Support.
My name is Sharif.
How can I help you today?
Hello.
I want to make a big complaint.
Yesterday only I bought the new phone from your Mid-Valley outlet.
Then this morning the screen totally blank already.
Cannot turn on way.
Gila, baru buy one day only.
Costly phones or more.
How can like this?
I'm so sorry to hear that, miss.
I completely understand your frustration.
Buy a new phone?
Definitely expect it to work perfectly, one.
Don't worry, we will help you check.
May I know your name and the phone model?
My name is Daphne.
The model is the Pro Max Edition one.
I already buy a full cache yesterday, you know.
I need to use the phone for my work now, but it's totally dead.
You better give me a one-to-one replacement now.
Don't ask me to wait for repair.
I don't want.
I understand, Daphne.
Since you just bought it yesterday,
it is definitely covered under our 7-day one-to-one instant replacement warranty.
Let me pull out your receipt data first.
Can you pass me your phone number or the serial number on the box?
My phone number is 012-345-6789.
Check fast-fast lah.
I got meeting soon.
If you guys tell me need to send to HQ for two weeks,
I strictly cannot accept ya.
Brand new phone already hardware failure.
Very kantoi lah like this.
Okay, Daphne.
I already found your receipt in our system.
Bought yesterday at 4pm, correct?
Don't worry.
You don't need to send to HQ and wait for two weeks.
I can issue an instant replacement voucher to your email right now.
Voucher?
Then how do I get the new phone?
I don't want to go to the shop and then the staff there say no stop.
Then I wait long-long again.
Understand, Daphne.
That's why this voucher will lock the physical stock at the Mid-Valley outlet immediately.
I already double-checked their inventory.
They have three units of your exact colour ready.
You just show up, show the email,
and they will pass you a fresh, unboxed unit on the spot.
Oh,
okay, okay.
Like that better.
So I just bring the dead phone with the original box and full accessories back to Mid-Valley lah.
No need to pay any extra fees, right?
Yes, correct.
Just bring the whole box set together with the dead phone.
No extra charges at all.
Everything is zero cost under your warranty.
I have already sent the voucher to your email.
Can you check if you got it or not?
Wait, ah.
Okay, got it already.
Instant exchange voucher for Mid-Valley outlet.
Whew, nasib baik.
Luckily you settled this fast for me.
Most welcome, Daphne.
Truly sorry for the bad experience with the first unit,
but I'm glad we can lock the new one for you.
Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
No, that's all.
I will go to the outlet straight after my meeting later.
Thanks, Sharif.
No problem at all, Daphne.
Have a smooth meeting today and take care.
